decisions_made: Step 8: targetRelay wired in Galaxy constructor after spawnRelays(); encounterPoint stores worldPos+dist+timeToReach; ◆ cyan glyph drawn at closest approach with distance annotation in 'wu'.
Step 9: escapeTrajectory/escapeStepIndex fields on Ship; boundary check uses this.blackholes[0] inside path loop; segments from escapeStepIndex onward drawn as #3dff7a green.

Step 10 (modified by user): orientation markers moved from canvas to DOM cockpit panel as HEADING REF section showing PRO/RET/RDL/ANT rows with delta angle from ship heading; 'ALIGNED' shown when within ~15°; hidden/--- when vel < 0.0001.
Step 10 layout fix: HEADING REF + SHIP STATUS wrapped in a shared div (lastCol) to share the 6th grid column — adding HEADING REF as a 7th direct child broke the 6-column grid.

Step 11: headingLock: HeadingLockMode = 'manual' and headingLockTier: 0|1|2|3 = 2 (default fully unlocked) added to Ship; updateHeadingLock() called after retrograde block, skips if retrogradeActive; MAN/PRO/RET/RDL/ANT buttons added to FLIGHT CTRL below existing buttons; rotation keys disengage lock; autoStab guarded with && headingLock === 'manual'.
Step 11 fix: alignment rate capped at Ship.RADIALPOWER (not *4) so heading lock speed scales with Q/E RCS adjustment.
next_action: Run /step to implement step 12: add dockingMode boolean + rcsForward/rcsSideways fields to Ship, implement updateDockingMode() where arrow keys translate in ship-local frame at 20% thrust draining monergol and Q/E rotate with angular damping always on, add DOCK MODE toggle button to FLIGHT CTRL section in CockpitHUD.
